prompt: I have a messy working tree with 15 changed files across 6 directories. Help me organize these into logical commits. The changes include: new user profile page (frontend + backend + tests), a database migration for the profile table, a bug fix in the email service, updated CI config to add Python 3.12 to the test matrix, and some refactoring of the auth module to extract a helper function.

assertions.text: Agent identifies at least 4 distinct commit groups from the described changes
CI config change gets a ci: type commit
Auth refactor gets a refactor: type commit (not feat: or fix:)
Email bug fix gets a fix: type commit
Agent presents the plan and asks for confirmation before committing
Agent acknowledges the large changeset and suggests smaller working sessions going forward
